top.title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain

top.title: 'Floating armoury' ship reportedly seized by Iran
top.summary: A vessel said to be a “floating armoury” in the Gulf of Oman has been seized by Iranian military personnel, according to reports.

top.title: CIA chief visits Cuba as energy crisis worsens
top.summary: The reported visit to Havana came after the US renewed an offer of aid to ease the effects of its oil blockade.

top.title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
top.summary: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.

top.title: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
top.summary: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.

top.title: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
top.summary: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
